Proposal lacks sufficient detail about methodology and expected contributions

reviewers.justification: While the specific combination of agentic AI and attention mechanism discovery appears novel, the proposal needs more detail to demonstrate its unique contribution beyond existing NAS approaches.

Compute requirements and feasibility analysis missing

fatal_flaws: Application of verbal reflection to attention optimization lacks demonstrated novelty beyond EV006's general approach

reviewers.justification: The core idea of applying verbal reflection to optimize system performance has already been demonstrated in EV006, with no clear evidence that extending this specifically to attention optimization constitutes a novel contribution.

fatal_flaws: Incomplete hypothesis that cannot be falsified
No reproducibility measures (seeds, compute details)

fatal_flaws: Uncertainty-aware attention mechanisms have been extensively explored in existing literature, though not specifically using MLE-bench principles
The adaptation of MLE-bench evaluation frameworks for attention mechanisms appears incremental rather than groundbreaking
No random seeds are mentioned, making the experimental results non-reproducible and unreliable.
fixable_flaws: Provide more detailed comparison with existing uncertainty-aware attention methods to highlight novel contributions
Clarify how this approach differs fundamentally from prior uncertainty-aware attention work beyond just the evaluation framework adaptation
The baseline is too narrow; consider adding other uncertainty estimation methods for a more complete comparison.
The 'digits' dataset is simple; demonstrating the method on a more complex benchmark would strengthen the claim.
The hypothesis contains a typo ('ECE will decrease b').

fatal_flaws: Uncertainty-aware attention mechanisms have been extensively explored in existing literature, though not specifically using MLE-bench principles
The adaptation of MLE-bench evaluation frameworks for attention mechanisms appears incremental rather than groundbreaking
fixable_flaws: Provide more detailed comparison with existing uncertainty-aware attention methods to highlight novel contributions
Clarify how this approach differs fundamentally from prior uncertainty-aware attention work beyond just the evaluation framework adaptation
reviewers.justification: While uncertainty-aware attention exists, this work doesn't sufficiently demonstrate novelty in the core mechanism beyond adapting existing evaluation frameworks.

fatal_flaws: No random seeds are mentioned, making the experimental results non-reproducible and unreliable.
fixable_flaws: The baseline is too narrow; consider adding other uncertainty estimation methods for a more complete comparison.
The 'digits' dataset is simple; demonstrating the method on a more complex benchmark would strengthen the claim.
The hypothesis contains a typo ('ECE will decrease b').
reviewers.justification: The experimental design is fundamentally flawed due to the omission of random seeds, rendering any results non-reproducible. The baseline is also too narrow and the simple dataset limits the generalizability of the findings.
